LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT HAVING REVIEWED THE PLEADINGS AND HAVING HEARD ORAL ARGUMENT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING WITH MODIFICATION AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF KEVIN PANKONIN'S MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT TO ADD NEWLY DISCOVERED DEFENDANTS AND TO SEEK PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS GRANTED. PARTIES STIPULATE THAT THE CONDITIONS STATED ON THE TENTATIVE RULING DO NOT APPLY. THE TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 24, 2018 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. NOTICE WAIVED. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MTORREANO@SFTC.ORG, REPORTED. (D302/HK)

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel;

There being no appearances, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS YU BAI, MINGHUI CHEN, AND GOLDEN OX TRANSPORTATION LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is off calendar. Notice of settlement filed August 17, 2018. In the future it is courteous to notify the court by phone or email the minute the parties settled, so the court does not have to do unnecessary work.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Complaint To Add Newly Discovered Defendants And To Seek Punitive Damages
Off Calendar Jan-23-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Anna Dubrovsky, Esq. 415-746-1477 ext 217 for Plaintiff.
Allan Isbell, Esq. 925-930-6600 of Archer Norris for Defendant Yu Qi Bai through Court Call.

RULING - A R G U E D. Defendant requests to continue the trial. Plaintiff does not oppose the request. Parties meet and confer re: trial date.

9:57 am. The matter is recalled. Parties report they have agreed to a trial date of September 24, 2018 at 9:30 am in Dept. 206. Notice is waived. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling with modification as follows:

PLAINTIFF KEVIN PANKONIN's Motion To Amend Complaint To Add Newly Discovered Defendants And To Seek Punitive Damages is Granted. Parties stipulate that the conditions stated on the tentative ruling do not apply. The trial date is continued to September 24, 2018 at 9:30 am in Dept. 206. Notice waived. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Defendant's Counsel to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, mtorreano@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/HK)
